text:
Market today: Cautiously optimistic tone — Bessent talking up 3% GDP growth is a tailwind for risk assets, and the OpenAI/Broadcom chip news is a direct shot of energy into your semiconductor and AI names. Tech mood is constructive but fragile; you're margin-exposed so any reversal hits harder than you think.

Your holdings: AVGO is your biggest problem — down 12% and it's your largest position; the Broadcom/OpenAI chip deal is a potential catalyst but you're already underwater and on a TRIM signal, so size matters here. PLTR is down 10.6% with a SELL flag — no clear near-term catalyst in today's news to rescue it. PTNM is down 15.25% and barely above its $9.50 stop — tiny spec on margin is the most dangerous spot in your book right now.

Watch: 1) How AVGO reacts to the OpenAI chip headline — real buying or just a pop-and-fade matters for your largest position. 2) PTNM's $9.50 stop — one bad tick and you're stopped out.

Bottom line: Your margin book has three live grenades — cut or trim before a broad tech pullback turns manageable losses into serious damage.
